message:
bd-ml2r.12.2: add FNX differential quality/performance reporting

Adds systematic FNX-on vs FNX-off differential reporting with:
- Versioned threshold policy (layout time 50%, render time 100%, bounds 1%)
- Delta classification: expected_improvement/neutral/regression
- Gate pass/fail with explicit failure reasons for root cause
- Edge crossing quality comparison
- Structure invariant validation (node/edge counts identical)
- Evidence logging with full metrics for both modes
- Blessed baselines support (BLESS_DIFFERENTIAL=1)
- Summary statistics tracking improvement/regression rates

11 tests covering all golden cases plus specific scenarios (diamond, hub-spoke, chain).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
